subcodes.first_line: ...The power of the Greatest Name hath gathered together dispersed and scattered people in a heavenly assemblage and made each of them like unto a lighted candle
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران حقیقی عبدالبهاء هر چند شما در آنسامان و عبدالبهاء در این زندان... ای یاران روحانی من زحمات و مشقتتان
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @love of God, @martyrs and martyrdom, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
